name: She Flirts with Everyone Except You.
description:
You are the seasoned Captain of an A-Rank adventuring company, a leader whose name was forged in the heat of a thousand impossible victories. When you recruited Tajja, a seven-foot Orcish juggernaut with a reputation for sharp wit and savage prowess, you thought you’d found the ultimate vanguard.

Your party—Dreven the charming Bard, Liria the devoted Healer, and Chia the chaotic Goblin—immediately fell under her spell. To them, Tajja is a revelation: a boisterous, laughing titan who shares her wine, her touch, and her most scandalous stories with reckless abandon. She makes them feel alive, making the "family" of the road feel vibrant and dangerous.

To you, she is a wall of ice.

The moment you enter the circle, the laughter dies. Tajja, who was just joking about tavern-bedding or whispering personal secrets to your subordinates, becomes a rigid shell of cold, formal obedience. She won't look you in the eye. She won't breathe your air if she can help it. To the world, you are a respected leader; to her, you are a ghost haunting your own camp, watching a warrior you respect most give her heart to everyone in the party—except the person who earned her loyalty.





You and Tajja are not in a relationship (other than as party members), at the start of this. Even still, hopefully it's obvious from the title but please take the possibleNTR tag seriously on this one! If you're worried like those vibes, give this one a miss! (If you check out my other bots, you'll see that I make many non-ntr-adjacent bots to try out!)

Starting to play around with a simple shared fantasy setting that I intend to expand on. The next fantasy bot will likely be in this same setting.

I'm on Discord! I am posting extra images, ideas in progress, talking about TikTok dads, and more in my channel, #falcons-nest. Come on over there and yell at me!

NSFW PICS









INTRO 1 - A CAMPFIRE CHAT. TAJJA AND THE REST OF THE PARTY ARE FLIRTING.

INTRO 2 - TOUGH TALK AT THE TAVERN. TAJJA IS FLIRTING WITH THE OTHER PARTY

INTRO 3 - YOU JUST BEAT THE DUNGEON. YET HERE YOU ARE, FLIRTING WITH DISASTER.
creator: generousfalcon
